  users: null

  text: |
    {
      "ignition": {
        "version": "3.1.0"
      },
      "storage": {
        "files": [
          {
            "path": "/etc/hostname",
            "mode": 420,
            "contents": {
              "source": "data:,myhostname"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    }
installer:
  anaconda: {}
  coreos: {}

locale: {}
name: 'Blueprint example: ingition'

  firewall: {}

  profile_id: ""

  fdo:
    manufacturing_server_url: ""
  redhat:
    connector:
      enabled: false
    insights:
      enabled: false
    subscription_manager: {}
